churn_model.definition: Active loan, no successful payment in 45+ days

ptp_model.definition: Collections contacted customer — will they pay within 7 days?

fabric_deployment.churn_trigger: Daily batch on silver.payments — flag loans with days_since_pay > 30
fabric_deployment.ptp_trigger: At each collection action creation — score and route to agent/self-serve
fabric_deployment.ews_trigger: At disbursement — score and write to gold.fact_disbursement_scored
